tasks.description: In ops.py, one of the four functions is wrong: mul(a, b) returns a + b instead of a * b. Fix it.
tasks.diff_summary:
diff -ru '--exclude=__pycache__' '--exclude=*.pyc' '--exclude=.git' '--exclude=artifacts' '--exclude=target' scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_014/ops.py /tmp/px-repofix-fix_014-2053846-1fdbb1a2520f41d69c1b3a7cb903ecee/ops.py
--- scripts/benchmarks/repo_fix/fix_014/ops.py	2026-06-15 09:50:19.575453999 -0400
+++ /tmp/px-repofix-fix_014-2053846-1fdbb1a2520f41d69c1b3a7cb903ecee/ops.py	2026-06-15 12:13:47.678868545 -0400
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
     return a - b
 
 def mul(a, b):
-    return a + b
+    return a * b
 
 def div(a, b):
     return a / b
